title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker23: coap_keys.c
close_reason: Fixed merge conflict in coap_keys.c by reconciling fingerprint and pubkey_to_iid implementations (consistent error handling, security memset on all paths for hash scrub), updated BUILD_ASSERT tracking tag and board config comment to include pfzl.
